response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Successfully matched the lyrics and timing of the two live performances ('Legend Changer' and 'potato ni natte iku') using the visual cues, on-screen text, and audio waveforms.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference database for correct Kanji and styling for both songs, adapting the timing perfectly to the live versions.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned with the vocal stems to maintain synchronization during the energetic singing. Left long instrumental gaps unsubtitled as instructed.

subtitles.original: Fight on! Fight on!
subtitles.english: Fight on! Fight on!

subtitles.original: 生きてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to live

subtitles.original: 伝えてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to convey

subtitles.original: 革命の火蓋切って
subtitles.english: Fire the opening gun of revolution

subtitles.original: 伝説の旗掲げて 行こう さあ
subtitles.english: Raise the legendary flag and let's go, come on!

subtitles.original: Legend-Changer の海に飛び込んで
subtitles.english: Plunge into the sea of Legend-Changer,

subtitles.original: 熱狂起こす当事者になれ
subtitles.english: and become the one who starts the craze!

subtitles.original: Legend-Changer 大胆に行こうぜ
subtitles.english: Legend-Changer, let's go boldly!

subtitles.original: 醒ませ本能を
subtitles.english: Awaken your instincts,

subtitles.original: 起こせ感動を
subtitles.english: create excitement!

subtitles.original: 伝説刻んで
subtitles.english: Carve out a legend,

subtitles.original: 大地蹴って蹴って蹴って Break!
subtitles.english: kick, kick, kick the earth, break!

subtitles.original: 長い長い夢の旅路を
subtitles.english: This long, long journey of dreams,

subtitles.original: 一歩また一歩と 確実に進んでいく
subtitles.english: step by step, we surely march forward.

subtitles.original: 鋭い眼差しで見据える先に
subtitles.english: Believing that at the end of this sharp gaze,

subtitles.original: みんなの笑顔があると信じて
subtitles.english: everyone's smile will be there,

subtitles.original: さあ行こう 高鳴る...!
subtitles.english: let's go! Throbbing...!

subtitles.original: 無数の眼差しに 見る栄光を
subtitles.english: Make the glory seen in countless gazes

subtitles.original: 憧れにして 終わらせるな
subtitles.english: your aspiration, and never let it end!

subtitles.original: 託された夢が隙を切って
subtitles.english: The entrusted dream cuts through the gaps,

subtitles.original: 今私の闘志へと 変わっていく
subtitles.english: and now it turns into my fighting spirit.

subtitles.original: さあ Legend-Changer の海に飛び込んで
subtitles.english: Come, plunge into the sea of Legend-Changer,

subtitles.original: 熱狂起こす当事者になれ
subtitles.english: and become the one who starts the craze!

subtitles.english: Awaken your instincts,

subtitles.original: 伝説刻んで
subtitles.english: Carve out a legend,

subtitles.original: 大地蹴って蹴って蹴って Break!
subtitles.english: kick, kick, kick the earth, break!

subtitles.original: Wow...
subtitles.english: Wow...

subtitles.original: Break, break, break out!
subtitles.english: Break, break, break out!

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: もう救えない スクラップばかりのアルペジオ
subtitles.english: No saving it now, an arpeggio of nothing but scrap metal

subtitles.original: チープな青春も お涙も それすら無いもんな
subtitles.english: A cheap youth, and even tears, we don't even have those

subtitles.original: 相当に笑えない コメディのワンシーンもままならない
subtitles.english: Quite unlaughable, we can't even manage a single scene of a comedy

subtitles.original: 冷めたチャウダーを ただ混ぜ合わせた さもそんな人生さ
subtitles.english: Just mixing cold chowder, such is life

subtitles.original: 掛け違えたボタンの身なりを
subtitles.english: The appearance of mismatched buttons...

subtitles.original: いつのいつまで見ぬ振りしようか
subtitles.english: How long shall we pretend not to see?

subtitles.original: そうかい 抗弁のしようもないな
subtitles.english: Is that so? There's no way to protest

subtitles.original: たまたま火事場に逃げ込んで
subtitles.english: Accidentally running into a fire,

subtitles.original: 善かれと油を放り込んで
subtitles.english: throwing in oil thinking it was for the best,

subtitles.original: 生活も計画も 全部がポテトになっていく
subtitles.english: daily life, plans, everything is becoming a potato!

subtitles.original: ぐつぐつ明日が泡吹いて
subtitles.english: Simmering, tomorrow bubbles over,

subtitles.original: 白目のままに茹で上がって
subtitles.english: boiling up with eyes rolled back,

subtitles.original: 将来像 成功法 全部がポテトになっていく
subtitles.english: future vision, successful methods, everything is becoming a potato!

subtitles.original: このままみんなで散り散らかして
subtitles.english: Scattering all over the place like this,

subtitles.original: 泥々に未来を溶かして
subtitles.english: melting the future into a muddy mess,

subtitles.original: そんな暮らしのままで KUSHA-KUSHAになっていこうぜ
subtitles.english: living that kind of life, let's get crumpled up!

subtitles.original: もう時間がない 我々に見下す権利などない
subtitles.english: There is no more time, we have no right to look down on anyone

subtitles.original: 有象無象が発した ブーイングも 今なら勲章さ
subtitles.english: The booing emitted by the rabble is now a medal of honor

subtitles.original: 相当に笑えない 誰がどう言わざるを得ない
subtitles.english: Quite unlaughable, whoever has no choice but to say so

subtitles.original: バカの一つ覚えのように空回って ただバターになっている
subtitles.english: Running in circles like a fool's only trick, just turning into butter

subtitles.original: 始めはこんなつもりじゃなかった 誰か信じてくれやしないか
subtitles.english: It wasn't supposed to be like this at first, won't anyone believe me?

subtitles.original: 一切 反証の余地はないが
subtitles.english: There's absolutely no room for disproof, though...

subtitles.original: あたかも何も知らぬ顔で
subtitles.english: Acting as if knowing nothing at all,

subtitles.original: ここぞと薪を投げ込んで
subtitles.english: throwing in firewood at the perfect moment,

subtitles.original: 生活も計画も 全部がポテトになっていく
subtitles.english: daily life, plans, everything is becoming a potato!

subtitles.original: こんがり明日が煮え切って
subtitles.english: The crispy tomorrow boils thoroughly,

subtitles.original: 姿見えぬほど燃え上がって
subtitles.english: burning up until it's out of sight,

subtitles.original: 将来像 成功法 全部がポテトになっていく
subtitles.english: future vision, successful methods, everything is becoming a potato!

subtitles.original: このままみんなで散り散らかして
subtitles.english: Scattering all over the place like this,

subtitles.original: 泥々に未来を溶かして
subtitles.english: melting the future into a muddy mess,

subtitles.original: そんなボウルの中で憂さ晴らしだとかしようぜ
subtitles.english: let's blow off some steam inside that bowl,

subtitles.original: そんな暮らしのままで KUSHA-KUSHAになっていこうぜ
subtitles.english: living that kind of life, let's get crumpled up!
